root_text.sn45.57-61:1.1: “Sūriyassa, bhikkhave, udayato etaṁ pubbaṅgamaṁ etaṁ pubbanimittaṁ, yadidaṁ—aruṇuggaṁ;
root_text.sn45.57-61:1.2: evameva kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno ariyassa aṭṭhaṅgikassa maggassa uppādāya etaṁ pubbaṅgamaṁ etaṁ pubbanimittaṁ, yadidaṁ—sīlasampadā …pe…

translation_text.sn45.57-61:0.3: Five Discourses on Accomplishment in Ethics, Etc. (2nd)
translation_text.sn45.57-61:1.1: “Mendicants, the dawn is the forerunner and precursor of the sunrise.
translation_text.sn45.57-61:1.2: In the same way accomplishment in ethics is the forerunner and precursor of the noble eightfold path for a mendicant. …”

reference_text.sn45.57-61:1.1: bj17.1.56, csp1ed14.25, csp2ed14.25, ms14S5_163, msdiv57-61, pts-vp-pli5.32
